a:r.a:t: Q23: I have the technology and tools I need to perform my job effectively.

Note: Average scores reflect the weighted mean of responses on a 5-point Likert scale (5 = Strongly Agree to 1 = Strongly Disagree), based on the distribution of all responses within each grouping. Neutral responses are included in the scoring as “3” but are excluded from the chart.
Strong confidence in tools and technology across all seniority levels, particularly in Sales, indicating systems are largely enabling effective performance
The Telemarketing Director+ population had the lowest sentiment, though the sample size is low compared to other groups
